svg.title: Step 4: Did we do a good enough job?
svg.desc: Threat modeling step four focuses on assessing effectiveness, checking for new threats, and treating the work as continuous.
svg.text: Step 4: Did We Do a Good Enough Job?
Verify that the chosen controls really address the identified threats.
Check the result rather than assuming the fix is sufficient.
Make sure the changes did not introduce new weaknesses
or shift the risk somewhere else in the system.
Threat modeling should be repeated regularly as the
application, architecture, and business context change.
